# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd default authorization policy for a namespace. Configure policy to handle services without explicit authorization rules. Set up default behavior for service-to-service communication. This is for our service mesh policy framework.
# Category: linkerd_policy_default_allow

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: LinkerdNamespaceAuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: default
  namespace: <your_namespace>
spec:
  policy:
    - from: '*'
      to: '*'
  defaultAction: Allow
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: LinkerdAuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: default
  namespace: <your_namespace>
spec:
  subjects:
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      names:
        - '*'
  rules:
    - {}
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: LinkerdDestinationRule
metadata:
  name: default
  namespace: <your_namespace>
spec:
  host: '*'
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: permissive
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: LinkerdPeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: default
  namespace: <your_namespace>
spec:
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: LinkerdServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: default
  namespace: <your_namespace>
spec:
  automountServiceAccountToken: false
```
